sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29101" key="duskah/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-κᾰής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n29101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to burn, burning badly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.952c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
